subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Earlier I was speaking with Áqa Mírza Mihdí, and I said to him: You must be very happy as you have a father who is a believer.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حالا با آقا میرزا مهدی صحبت میکردم میگفتم که باید بسیار مسرور باشی که پدر مومنی داری
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @high station of learning
